Interface PlayerObserver

All Known Implementing Classes:
ServerVirtualView
public interface PlayerObserver
Observer interface for player-level state changes in Mesos. Implemented by ServerVirtualView to forward player events (food changes, card draws, extra-draw requests) to all connected clients.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
    Called when a card is added to the player's tribe.
    void
    notifyFoodChanged(String playerNickName, int newFood)
    Called when the player's food total changes.
    void
    notifyPPChanged(String playerNickName, int newPP)
    Called when the player's prestige-point total changes.
    void
    onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
    Called once at game start to push the full initial player state to the observer.
    void
    requestExtraDraw(String nickname)
    Called when the player must select one extra card from the market (draw-one-more building effect).

  • Method Details

    • onPlayerChanged

      void onPlayerChanged(String nickname, Totem totem, int food, int prestigePoint, List<Card> tribe, List<BuildingCard> buildingCards)
      Called once at game start to push the full initial player state to the observer.
      Parameters:
      nickname - the player's nickname.
      totem - the player's totem.
      food - the player's starting food total.
      prestigePoint - the player's starting prestige-point total.
      tribe - the player's initial tribe (empty at game start).
      buildingCards - the player's initial buildings (empty at game start).

    • notifyFoodChanged

      void notifyFoodChanged(String playerNickName, int newFood)
      Called when the player's food total changes.
      Parameters:
      playerNickName - the affected player's nickname.
      newFood - the player's new food total.

    • notifyPPChanged

      void notifyPPChanged(String playerNickName, int newPP)
      Called when the player's prestige-point total changes.
      Parameters:
      playerNickName - the affected player's nickname.
      newPP - the player's new prestige-point total.

    • notifyCardAddedToTribe

      void notifyCardAddedToTribe(String playername, Card cardAdded)
      Called when a card is added to the player's tribe.
      Parameters:
      playername - the affected player's nickname.
      cardAdded - the card that was added.

    • requestExtraDraw

      void requestExtraDraw(String nickname)
      Called when the player must select one extra card from the market (draw-one-more building effect).
      Parameters:
      nickname - the affected player's nickname.
